heading: How We Process
subheading: A simple and transparent step-by-step process to help you buy, sell, or invest in real estate with ease.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.description: We understand your requirements, budget, and property goals through a detailed consultation.

steps.title: Property Selection
steps.description: We shortlist the best matching properties based on your needs and market availability.

steps.title: Site Visits
steps.description: We arrange property visits so you can evaluate options before making a decision.

steps.title: Negotiation
steps.description: We help you get the best possible deal through professional price negotiation.

steps.title: Documentation
steps.description: We handle all legal paperwork and ensure a smooth and secure transaction process.

steps.title: Handover
steps.description: Once everything is completed, we ensure a hassle-free property handover to you.
